assumptions: live prompts should stay short and calm
the first release should favor low-friction guidance
users respond better to one next step at a time
risks: too much prompting may feel intrusive
unclear prompt wording may slow scan completion
next_required_validation: Hermes review before live in-app prompt activation
primary_user_goal: Help the user move smoothly through the app with clear, human, low-friction prompts.
fallback_rule: If confidence is low, use the shortest neutral prompt and one next-step action.
